title: Make
description: Make is a Forge modpack for Minecraft 1.16.5 and 1.20.1, focused on technology, automation, magic, exploration, building, vehicles, storage systems, and QoL. The 1.20.1 version is heavier and is recommended for PCs stronger than an i3-9100F.
body:
# Make

**Make is a Minecraft Forge modpack focused on technology, automation, magic, exploration, building, storage systems, vehicles, and quality-of-life improvements.**

Make has versions for **Minecraft 1.16.5** and **Minecraft 1.20.1**, bringing a large survival experience with machines, factories, magic systems, world exploration, decoration, and useful tools for long-term gameplay.

## Overview

Make is designed for players who want a bigger and more complete Minecraft experience.

The modpack combines tech progression, automation, storage networks, magic, exploration, structures, decoration, vehicles, and quality-of-life features into one ready-to-play pack.

You can build factories, automate resources, explore new biomes and structures, create advanced storage systems, decorate detailed bases, use vehicles, experiment with magic, and play survival with more depth.

## Versions

### Make 1.16.5

The original 1.16.5 version focuses on a classic Forge modded experience with technology, magic, exploration, decoration, and space progression.

It includes content such as:

- JEI and quality-of-life tools
- JourneyMap
- Mekanism
- Thermal Expansion / Thermal Foundation
- Botania
- Astral Sorcery
- Biomes O’ Plenty
- Beyond Earth / Space-BossTools
- Chisels & Bits
- Supplementaries
- Decoration and exploration mods

### Make 1.20.1

The newer 1.20.1 version updates the pack with a stronger focus on Create automation, modern tech systems, storage networks, exploration, vehicles, structures, furniture, and performance/stability improvements.

It includes content such as:

- Create and many Create add-ons
- Mekanism and Mekanism add-ons
- Applied Energistics 2
- Immersive Engineering
- Botania
- Biomes O’ Plenty
- Terralith
- Alex’s Mobs
- Serene Seasons
- Waystones
- Immersive Vehicles
- Immersive Aircraft
- SecurityCraft
- Storage Drawers
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Iron Chests
- Macaw’s building mods
- Furniture and decoration mods
- JEI, Jade, AppleSkin, Xaero’s Minimap, Xaero’s World Map, and other QoL mods

## Main Features

### Technology & Automation

Make includes large technology progression with machines, energy systems, resource processing, automation, factories, and advanced crafting.

Depending on the version, the pack includes mods such as:

- Create
- Mekanism
- Immersive Engineering
- Applied Energistics 2
- Thermal Expansion / Thermal Foundation
- Refined Storage
- OpenComputers
- Extended Crafting
- Storage Drawers
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Iron Chests

### Magic & Nature

The pack also includes magic and nature-based progression for players who enjoy non-technical systems.

Depending on the version, the pack includes:

- Botania
- Astral Sorcery
- Garden of Glass
- Mechanical Botania
- Magic-related compatibility mods

### Exploration & World Generation

Make expands the world with new biomes, structures, mobs, seasons, dungeons, and exploration tools.

Depending on the version, the pack includes:

- Biomes O’ Plenty
- Terralith
- Structory
- Roguelike Dungeons
- Alex’s Mobs
- Creeper Overhaul
- Serene Seasons
- Moog’s Voyager Structures
- Waystones
- Dynamic Surroundings

### Building & Decoration

The pack includes many building and decoration options for houses, factories, bases, cities, and survival builds.

Depending on the version, the pack includes:

- Chisels & Bits
- Supplementaries
- Macaw’s building mods
- Another Furniture
- Refurbished Furniture
- Rechiseled
- Rechiseled Create
- Connected Glass
- Decorative factory and industrial blocks

### Vehicles, Movement & Gameplay

Make includes extra gameplay systems for movement, transport, vehicles, and survival utility.

Depending on the version, the pack includes:

- Immersive Vehicles
- Immersive Aircraft
- Create trains and vehicle-related add-ons
- Simple Voice Chat
- Carry On
- Corpse
- FallingTree
- SecurityCraft
- Curios

### Quality of Life

Make includes several quality-of-life mods to make survival and modded gameplay easier to manage.

Depending on the version, the pack includes:

- JEI
- Jade / Waila / HWYLA
- AppleSkin
- JourneyMap
- Xaero’s Minimap
- Xaero’s World Map
- Mouse Tweaks
- Inventory Tweaks
- Clumps
- Tooltip improvements
- Performance and stability helper mods

### Space Exploration

The 1.16.5 version includes space progression through Beyond Earth / Space-BossTools and related add-ons, allowing players to progress beyond the Overworld and explore space-themed content.

## Performance Note

Make is a large modpack, especially the **Minecraft 1.20.1** version.

The 1.20.1 version can run on an **Intel i3-9100F**, but this CPU is close to the lower limit for the pack and may experience freezes or stutters, especially in large bases, factories, explored worlds, or servers with many machines and entities.

For a smoother experience, a CPU stronger than the i3-9100F is recommended.

A **GTX 1650** is enough to run the pack, but players should lower render distance, simulation distance, particles, minimap settings, and extra visual effects if they experience lag.

The pack needs at least around **3.2 GB of free RAM available for Minecraft just to start**, but this is not the recommended amount for stable gameplay.

Recommended RAM allocation:

- Minimum to start: around **3.2 GB free for Minecraft**
- Recommended for 1.20.1: **4 GB to 6 GB allocated**
- Better experience: **8 GB+ system RAM**, with enough RAM left for Windows and background apps

For PCs with only **8 GB of total system RAM**, allocating around **4 GB** to Minecraft is recommended. Allocating too much RAM may cause Windows to use the page file, which can create 1–5 second freezes.

## Recommended Requirements

### Make 1.16.5

The 1.16.5 version is generally lighter than the 1.20.1 version and should run on weaker PCs, but performance depends on world size, installed shaders/resource packs, render distance, and the number of machines, entities, and loaded chunks.

- Minecraft: **1.16.5**
- Mod Loader: **Forge**
- Recommended Java: **Java 8**
- Recommended RAM allocation: **4 GB to 6 GB**
- GPU: A basic dedicated GPU is recommended
- Notes: Lower render distance and particles are recommended for weaker PCs

### Make 1.20.1

The 1.20.1 version is heavier and is recommended for stronger PCs.

- Minecraft: **1.20.1**
- Mod Loader: **Forge**
- Recommended Java: **Java 17**
- Minimum free RAM to start: around **3.2 GB available for Minecraft**
- Recommended RAM allocation: **4 GB to 6 GB**
- Better system RAM: **8 GB to 16 GB**
- GPU: **GTX 1650 or better recommended**
- CPU: Stronger than an **Intel i3-9100F** recommended

An Intel **i3-9100F** can run the 1.20.1 version, but it may stutter or freeze depending on the world, server, base size, machines, entities, and client settings.

## Required Credits

This modpack includes third-party content made by their respective developers.

Some included mods require or request attribution. Please support the original developers by visiting their official pages and respecting their licenses.

### Credits from the original version

- [Astral Sorcery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astral-sorcery)
- [Corpse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)

### Additional Notice

All third-party mods included in this modpack belong to their original authors and remain under their own licenses.

This modpack does not claim ownership of any third-party mods. The modpack only organizes and configures the included mods into a playable experience.

## License & Usage

**Make Modpack © 2025 Alexsandro**

You may download and play this modpack for personal use.

You may modify the pack for private/personal use only.

Redistribution, public sharing, re-uploading, or hosting modified or unmodified versions of this modpack outside the official project page is not allowed without prior permission.

Third-party mods remain under their original licenses.

## Final Note

Thank you for playing **Make**.

Have fun building, automating, exploring, creating factories, experimenting with magic, and surviving in a much larger Minecraft world.
